content.text: User login guide to access NCGov-Guest SSID via a laptop
Click on Computer Icon in bottom right of screen to open options
Once a popup screen appears, select arrow button beside wifi symbol. This will show you a list of available wireless network SSID's

content.description: Taskbar computer icon and audio icon
Windows Action Center or Quick Settings panel showing network, bluetooth, and other settings
Windows Wi-Fi connection menu showing a list of available networks including NCGov-Guest
Connection dialog for NCGov-Guest showing the Connect button

content.text: Once NCGov-Guest SSID is selected, you will receive a popup screen to enter the network security key (pre-shared key password) and select Next
You will be presented with a verifying and connecting screen
You will click “Accept” on the Secure Internet Portal splash page acknowledging the terms of use

content.description: Popup screen on a mobile device prompting for the network security key for NCGov-Guest.
content.caption: Popup screen for NCGov-Guest network security key

content.description: Connecting screen on a mobile device showing the status 'Verifying and connecting' for NCGov-Guest.
content.caption: Verifying and connecting screen

content.description: Secure Internet Portal splash page with Terms of Use and an Accept button.
content.caption: Secure Internet Portal splash page

content.text: You should see in the list of Wireless Networks that your device is now connected to NCGov-Guest

content.description: Secure Internet Portal - Login Successful screen
content.caption: Powered by North Carolina Department of Information Technology - NC DIT Secure Internet Portal. Login Successful. You are now connected to the North Carolina DIT State Wireless Guest Network. North Carolina Department of Information Technology.

content.description: Wi-Fi settings screen showing connection to NCGov-Guest
content.caption: Wi-Fi. NCGov-Guest. No internet, secured. Disconnect.
